The '''Jin''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sapients]] native to the [[Zchtek worlds]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] officer [[Dutra Zeneta]] was a Jin.

Jin could see in the [[Infrared/Legends|infrared]] spectrum, allowing them to see in complete darkness providing there were nearby heat sources.<ref name="AJ10" />

The Jin were also known to have a culture rich in arts and literature.<ref name="AJ10" />
